debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A B : Set U
h1 : B ⊆ A
h2 : ctble ↑A
⊢ ctble ↑B

proof:
by
  have h3 : ctble A := h2
  have h4 : ∃ (f : A → Nat), one_to_one f := Theorem_8_1_5_3_type.mp h3
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h4
  apply Theorem_8_1_5_3_type.mpr
  define at h1
  let g : B → A := fun b => ⟨b.val, h1 b.property⟩
  use f ∘ g
  define
  fix b1 : B; fix b2 : B
  assume h : (f ∘ g) b1 = (f ∘ g) b2
  define at hf
  have h5 : g b1 = g b2 := hf (g b1) (g b2) h
  have h6 : (g b1).val = (g b2).val := congrArg Subtype.val h5
  exact Subtype.ext h6

  let f : B → A := fun x => ⟨x.val, h3 x⟩
  have hf : one_to_one f := by
    define
    fix x1 x2
    assume h
    simp only [f] at h
    have : x1.val = x2.val := by
      have := congrArg Subtype.val h
      exact this
    exact Subtype.ext this
  exact ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 (range f)

by
  have h3 : ∃ (f : B → A), one_to_one f := by
    use fun (x : B) => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩
    define
    intro x1 x2 h
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact congrArg Subtype.val h
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h3
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := Theorem_8_1_5_3_type.mp h2
  apply Theorem_8_1_5_3_type.mpr
  use g ∘ f
  define
  intro x1 x2 h
  have hfx : f x1 = f x2 := hg (f x1) (f x2) h
  exact hf x1 x2 hfx

  have h3 : ∀ x : B, x.val ∈ A := fun x => h1 x.property
  set C : Set A := {a : A | a.val ∈ B}
  have h4 : C ∼ B := by
    define
    use fun c => ⟨c.val.val, c.property⟩
    define
    apply And.intro
    · define
      intro c1 c2 h
      apply Subtype.ext
      apply Subtype.ext
      have h' : (⟨c1.val.val, c1.property⟩ : B) = ⟨c2.val.val, c2.property⟩ := h
      exact congrArg Subtype.val h'
    · define
      intro b
      use ⟨⟨b.val, h1 b.property⟩, b.property⟩
      rfl
  have h5 : ctble C := ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 C
  exact ctble_of_ctble_equinum h4 h5

by
  have h3 : B ∼ {x : A | x.val ∈ B} := by
    define
    set f : B → {x : A | x.val ∈ B} := fun b => ⟨⟨b.val, h1 b.property⟩, b.property⟩
    apply Exists.intro f
    define
    constructor
    · define
      intro b1 b2 h
      have : (f b1).val.val = (f b2).val.val := by
